title: Braised Pork Jjigae
description: A mexican fusion dish combining the spicy flavors of jjigae with the rich flavors of braised pork.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add pork and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove pork from pot and set aside.
Add onion and garlic to pot and cook until onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add cumin, chili flakes, and charred jalapeños to pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add canned diced tomatoes, browned pork, and lime juice to pot.
Stir to combine, then bring to a simmer.
Transfer pot to oven and braise for 2 hours, or until pork is tender.
Stir in molten cheddar and cook until melted and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with cilantro and lime wedges.
